examples: Officially called Port Jackson, the harbour stretches some 20km inland to join the mouth of the Parramatta River.
Arthur Phillip High School is located in the centre of Parramatta city and its students live in the suburbs around Parramatta.
New Parramatta coach Stephen Kearney previously worked with Orford during his days at Melbourne.
When it comes to noisy and unsightly motorways, Parramatta Road, Sydney's major east-west artery, takes the cake.
At the very start of Parramatta Road, the castle-like buildings of Sydney University were modeled on London's Westminster Abbey.
